mapper.insert: insert into aiw_backtest_result (biz_id, owner_user_biz_id, strategy_code, strategy_version, start_date, end_date, initial_capital, benchmark_code, parameters, metrics, result_uri, status, failure_reason, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at) values (#{bizId}, #{ownerUserBizId}, #{strategyCode}, #{strategyVersion}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{initialCapital}, #{benchmarkCode}, #{parameters}, #{metrics}, #{resultUri}, #{status}, #{failureReason}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) on duplicate key update owner_user_biz_id = values(owner_user_biz_id), strategy_code = values(strategy_code), strategy_version = values(strategy_version), start_date = values(start_date), end_date = values(end_date), initial_capital = values(initial_capital), benchmark_code = values(benchmark_code), parameters = values(parameters), metrics = values(metrics), result_uri = values(result_uri), status = values(status), failure_reason = values(failure_reason), started_at = values(started_at), completed_at = values(completed_at), updated_at = values(updated_at)
